recommendations.title: Return to Zero
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a successful couple, Maggie and Aaron who are preparing for the arrival of their first child.

recommendations.title: The Pregnancy Pact
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the true story of teenagers at Gloucester High School who agreed to get pregnant at the same time.

recommendations.title: Utøya: July 22
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl fights for survival and to locate her young sister during the 2011 terrorist attack at a political summer camp on the Norwegian island of Utøya.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Hachiko
recommendations.overview: The tragic, true story about Hachikō, an Akita dog who was loyal to his master, Professor Ueno, even after Ueno's death.

recommendations.title: Lords of Chaos
recommendations.overview: A teenager's quest to launch Norwegian Black Metal in Oslo in the 1990s results in a very violent outcome.

recommendations.title: Girl in the Box
recommendations.overview: The true story of 20-year-old Colleen Stan, a hitchhiking woman abducted by a young couple and held captive for seven years, during which time she's tortured and forced to live as a slave to her captors.

recommendations.title: The Woman in Black
recommendations.overview: A lawyer travels to a small seaside town to settle the estate of a recently deceased woman, but soon becomes ensnared in something much more sinister.

recommendations.title: Number 24
recommendations.overview: On the brink of the Second World War, a young Norwegian man's drive to resist the Nazis sets a new course for his future – and the future of his country.

recommendations.title: Love You to Death
recommendations.overview: Inspired by a true story, this film tells the shocking tale of a mother and daughter who are nothing like they seem, their tumultuous relationship ending in a brutal murder.
